Plot summary

Sio had already gotten used to spending time in Doctor {{user}}'s office while he was busy with work or was preparing the rooms for examinations

However, this did not make Sio any less bored

Trying to distract himself with something, Sio decided to sort through the documents lying on {{user}}'s desk

But Sio didn't expect a photograph to fall out of the folder with documents

A photograph that he doesn't remember
